creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 170842
Patch to the ports tree

The attached patch updates cad/openvsp to version 3.6.1

Very simple update.

Attached poudriere logs for {10.1,10.3}amd64.

Note: the port never compiled on < 10 since one of the dependencies (graphics/code-eli) is broken.
